title: Linux Archive Data Collected for Exfiltration
description: Detects creation of compressed archives from sensitive directories. Attackers archive collected data (credentials, source code, configs) before exfiltrating to reduce transfer size and avoid detection.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (( ((msg like '*tar -czf*' or msg like '*tar czf*' or msg like '*tar -cjf*' or msg like '*tar cjf*')) or ((msg like '*zip -r /tmp*' or msg like '*zip -r /dev/shm*' or msg like '*zip -r /var/tmp*')) ) and ((msg like '*/etc/*' or msg like '*/home/*' or msg like '*/root/*' or msg like '*/var/www/*' or msg like '*/opt/*')))
